metadata.title: UX Research & Analysis - Sources
metadata.description: Curated resources for UX research methodologies, journey mapping, competitive analysis, usability testing, metrics frameworks, feedback analysis, research ops governance, demographic-inclusive research, A/B testing, and optional AI/automation research methods.

standards_and_regulation.name: ISO 9241-210:2019 (Human-centred design for interactive systems)
standards_and_regulation.description: Primary standard describing human-centred design principles and activities

standards_and_regulation.name: ISO 9241-11:2018 (Usability: Definitions and concepts)
standards_and_regulation.description: Primary standard defining usability as effectiveness, efficiency, satisfaction in context

standards_and_regulation.name: WCAG 2.2 (W3C Recommendation)
standards_and_regulation.description: Primary accessibility standard used for product acceptance criteria

standards_and_regulation.name: GDPR (EU 2016/679)
standards_and_regulation.description: Primary EU privacy regulation relevant to consent/PII handling in research

standards_and_regulation.name: European Accessibility Act (Directive (EU) 2019/882)
standards_and_regulation.description: EU accessibility requirements for covered products/services after 28 Jun 2025
